entity.label: Siphmoth
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Fruitful places, some unknown place in the south, where David found friends when he fled from Saul (1 Sam. 30:28).

nodes.label: Siphmoth
nodes.description: Fruitful places, some unknown place in the south, where David found friends when he fled from Saul (1 Sam. 30:28).

verses.text: And to them which were in Aroer, and to them which were in Siphmoth, and to them which were in Eshtemoa,
